ns0:entry.ns0:title: Livox-SDK/livox_ros_driver2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Livox-SDK/livox_ros_driver2
Language: c++
Livox device driver under Ros(Compatible with ros and ros2), support Lidar HAP and Mid-360.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MariaDB/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MariaDB/server
Language: c++
MariaDB server is a community developed fork of MySQL server. Started by core members of the original MySQL team, MariaDB actively works with outside developers to deliver the most featureful, stable, and sanely licensed open SQL server in the industry.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/cuda-quantum
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-quantum
Language: c++
C++ and Python support for the CUDA Quantum programming model for heterogeneous quantum-classical workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaddlePaddle/Paddle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/Paddle
Language: c++
PArallel Distributed Deep LEarning: Machine Learning Framework from Industrial Practice （『飞桨』核心框架，深度学习&机器学习高性能单机、分布式训练和跨平台部署）

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UZ-SLAMLab/ORB_SLAM3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UZ-SLAMLab/ORB_SLAM3
Language: c++
ORB-SLAM3: An Accurate Open-Source Library for Visual, Visual-Inertial and Multi-Map SLAM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YosysHQ/yosys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys
Language: c++
Yosys Open SYnthesis Suite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/MNN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/MNN
Language: c++
MNN: A blazing-fast, lightweight inference engine battle-tested by Alibaba, powering high-performance on-device LLMs and Edge AI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: catchorg/Catch2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/catchorg/Catch2
Language: c++
A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: falcosecurity/falco
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/falcosecurity/falco
Language: c++

URL: https://github.com/google/googletest
Language: c++
GoogleTest - Google Testing and Mocking Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/leveldb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/leveldb
Language: c++
LevelDB is a fast key-value storage library written at Google that provides an ordered mapping from string keys to string values.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ikawrakow/ik_llama.cpp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ikawrakow/ik_llama.cpp
Language: c++
llama.cpp fork with additional SOTA quants and improved performance

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iree-org/iree
Language: c++
A retargetable MLIR-based machine learning compiler and runtime toolkit.

The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: official-stockfish/Stockfish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/official-stockfish/Stockfish

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redpanda-data/redpanda
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda
Language: c++
Redpanda is a streaming data platform for developers. Kafka API compatible. 10x faster. No ZooKeeper. No JVM!

Control WS2812B and many more types of digital RGB LEDs with an ESP32 over WiFi!
